name: AutoFlow SaaS
description: Multi-channel communication automation platform for MENA businesses — owned roadmap, defined MVP scope, and led a 4-person team from spec to ship.
impact: Impact: shipped multi-channel SaaS from zero to live in 4 months.

name: BeTrend — AI SaaS Platform
description: Full-stack AI product built on Frappe with CLIP model for image popularity prediction. Managed 4-person team, product backlog, and multi-platform delivery.
impact: Impact: launched AI SaaS with 4-person team and multi-platform delivery.

name: WooCommerce ↔ Daftra Sync Plugin
description: Spec'd and delivered a WordPress-to-ERP sync plugin with retry logic, error logging, and stakeholder sign-off on acceptance criteria.
impact: Impact: automated WooCommerce-to-ERP order and customer sync.

name: AutoFlow Landing Pages
description: Conversion-focused marketing landing pages for the AutoFlow SaaS product — wrote copy, designed UX, and tracked conversion metrics.
impact: Impact: conversion-focused landing pages with measurable KPIs.

name: Softmindset Landing Page
description: Product-managed a React landing page with A/B testing, analytics integration, and Google Cloud Run deployment for measurable conversion improvement.
impact: Impact: analytics-ready landing with conversion tracking from day one.

name: Video Summarization
description: Flask app converting video/audio to summaries using Whisper v3 and BART. Defined user stories and success metrics before development.
impact: Impact: automated video-to-summary workflow with measurable accuracy targets.

name: WhatsApp Landing Pages
description: Landing pages for WhatsApp business automation — product-led copy and measurable click-through optimization.
impact: Impact: marketing pages with tracked conversion goals.
